examples: The arbitral tribunal shall decide as amiable compositeur only if the parties have authorised the arbitral tribunal to do so.
The arbitral tribunal shall decide as amiable compositeur or ex aequo et bono only if the parties have expressly authorised the arbitral tribunal to do so.
The arbitral award shall be final and binding upon both parties.
After all, the Treaty identifies the World Court as one of four "arbitral tribunals" which must be used to resolve disputes under LOST.
